name: Spinach Wrap Ups
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Pepperidge Farm herb stuffing mix
2 packages Frozen chopped spinach (cooked and well drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in the water.
2. Stir in the stuffing mix.
3. Add the remaining ingredients: parmesan cheese, cooked spinach, sausage, beaten eggs, and bacon.
4. Chill for 1 hour.
5. Shape into walnut-sized balls.
6. Cut the bacon into 4 pieces and wrap each ball securely with toothpicks.
7. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 35 minutes.
